name: Text Overlay
description: Reproducible twin of create_text_overlay: a Text TOP renders a caption which a Composite TOP lays over a background source. A synthetic radial rampTOP stands in as the background so it previews offline; swap it for a selectTOP pointing at your live output to caption a real feed (the orchestrator's no-source path is just the Text TOP on transparent). Edit the Text TOP's text/font params or bind them for live titling. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; live-cook-validated on TD 099 build 2025.32820.

nodes.name: bg
nodes.comment: Synthetic background — swap for a selectTOP to caption your real feed.

nodes.name: text
nodes.comment: The caption on a transparent background (bgalpha 0) so it composites cleanly.

nodes.name: comp
nodes.comment: Lays the text (input 0) over the background (input 1).

preview_description: White 'tdmcp' title centered over a soft radial gradient — a caption composited over a background, ready to swap the background for a live feed.
